channel.title: European Strategic Autonomy on Asymmetric Intelligence
channel.description: Recent content in European Strategic Autonomy on Asymmetric Intelligence

item.title: European Geopolitical & Hybrid Threat Monitor -- W/E 29 March 2026
item.description: Hungary election crisis deepens with BBC voter intimidation expose and confirmed Russian political technologists in Budapest; NATO reports 20% European defence spending increase; Slovenia election produces razor-thin result amid Israeli Black Cube interference.

item.title: European Geopolitical & Hybrid Threat Monitor -- W/E 29 March 2026
item.description: Hungary election crisis deepens with BBC voter intimidation expose and confirmed Russian political technologists in Budapest; NATO reports 20% European defence spending increase; Slovenia election produces razor-thin result amid Israeli Black Cube interference.
